name: BRINKBURN ST BREWERY
tagline: A loved local taphouse in Newcastle’s Ouseburn Valley — handcrafted beers brewed on-site, locally sourced food, and brewery tours.
registeredAddress: Ouseburn Valley, Byker, Newcastle upon Tyne, United Kingdom
pageTitle: BRINKBURN ST BREWERY — Microbrewery & Taproom in Newcastle
menuIntroText: Handcrafted beers brewed on-site in our microbrewery — from refreshing session ales to bold IPAs and rich stouts, plus proper scran from the kitchen.

items.name: Byker Pale Ale
items.desc: Easy-drinking session pale, citrus and biscuit. 4.0%

items.name: Ouseburn IPA
items.desc: Bold, resinous IPA with tropical hop character. 5.8%

items.name: Ford Stout
items.desc: Smooth roast stout, coffee and dark chocolate. 5.2%

items.name: Valley Lager
items.desc: Crisp, clean lager brewed for the long NE summer. 4.3%

items.name: Small Plates
items.desc: Northern-inspired bites to share — perfect with a pint.

items.name: Brinkburn Burger
items.desc: Locally sourced beef, smoked cheese, house pickles.

items.name: Sunday Roast
items.desc: Slow-cooked roast with all the trimmings. Sundays only.

items.name: Brewery Tour
items.desc: Behind-the-scenes look at the microbrewery with a guide.

items.name: Beer Tasting Flight
items.desc: Five core and seasonal beers, explained by our brewers.

reviews.name: Sophie T.
reviews.text: Best taproom in the Ouseburn. The IPA is unreal and the burger is bang on. Proper local spot.

reviews.name: Dan M.
reviews.text: Took the brewery tour for a mate’s birthday — brilliant, friendly and the flights were spot on.

reviews.name: Aisha K.
reviews.text: Sunday roast here is legendary. Cosy, characterful, never rushed. Our go-to.

reservationNote: Brewery tours and private hire can be booked online. For groups of 8+ or events, get in touch via the form.
screenshotsIntro: A warm, characterful taphouse in the Ouseburn Valley — the clink of glasses, the hum of the brewhouse, and the smell of fresh pizza from the kitchen.
footerNote: © BRINKBURN ST BREWERY. Crafted with care in Newcastle.
subtitle: Microbrewery · Bar · Kitchen
